TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Curtis Borchardt nalecuhan i New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Curtis Borchardt i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Orlando Magic putiput. 9 bulad 13 demiad, 1980 a mihca, Curtis Borchardt, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦurtis borʦħardt nar~ɾəʦuħan i nəw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ʦurtis borʦħardt i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu orr~ɾando magiʦ putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦurtis borʦħardt, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Curtis Borchardt nalecuhan i New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Curtis Borchardt i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Orlando Magic putiput. 9 bulad 13 demiad, 1980 a mihca, Curtis Borchardt, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦurtis borʦħardt nar~ɾəʦuħan i nəw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ʦurtis borʦħardt i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu orr~ɾando magiʦ putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦurtis borʦħardt, miunduaj.
